query:
ALTER TABLE chatbot_settings
  ADD COLUMN mode VARCHAR(32) DEFAULT 'all' NOT NULL COMMENT 'all, whitelist, blacklist',
  ADD COLUMN respondGroups BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE NOT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN respondPrivate BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE NOT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN onlyWhenMentioned BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE NOT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN triggerWords TEXT DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN welcomeMessage TEXT DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN awayMessage TEXT DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN businessHoursEnabled BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE NOT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN businessHoursStart VARCHAR(5) DEFAULT '09:00',
  ADD COLUMN businessHoursEnd VARCHAR(5) DEFAULT '18:00',
  ADD COLUMN businessHoursDays VARCHAR(32) DEFAULT '1,2,3,4,5',
  ADD COLUMN businessHoursTimezone VARCHAR(64) DEFAULT 'America/Sao_Paulo',
  ADD COLUMN replyDelay INT DEFAULT 0 COMMENT 'Delay in seconds before replying',
  ADD COLUMN contextMessageCount INT DEFAULT 10 COMMENT 'Number of previous messages to include as context',
  ADD COLUMN rateLimitPerHour INT DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '0 = unlimited',
  ADD COLUMN rateLimitPerDay INT DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '0 = unlimited',
  ADD COLUMN temperature DECIMAL(3,2) DEFAULT 0.70;

ALTER TABLE chatbot_settings
  ADD COLUMN mode VARCHAR(32) DEFAULT 'all' NOT NULL COMMENT 'all, whitelist, blacklist',
  ADD COLUMN respondGroups BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE NOT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN respondPrivate BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE NOT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN onlyWhenMentioned BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE NOT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN triggerWords TEXT DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN welcomeMessage TEXT DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN awayMessage TEXT DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN businessHoursEnabled BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE NOT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN businessHoursStart VARCHAR(5) DEFAULT '09:00',
  ADD COLUMN businessHoursEnd VARCHAR(5) DEFAULT '18:00',
  ADD COLUMN businessHoursDays VARCHAR(32) DEFAULT '1,2,3,4,5',
  ADD COLUMN businessHoursTimezone VARCHAR(64) DEFAULT 'America/Sao_Paulo',
  ADD COLUMN replyDelay INT DEFAULT 0 COMMENT 'Delay in seconds before replying',
  ADD COLUMN contextMessageCount INT DEFAULT 10 COMMENT 'Number of previous messages to include as context',
  ADD COLUMN rateLimitPerHour INT DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '0 = unlimited',
  ADD COLUMN rateLimitPerDay INT DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '0 = unlimited',
  ADD COLUMN temperature DECIMAL(3,2) DEFAULT 0.70;
